requirements.statement: A reviewer can read one textual source and understand the control intent without opening a commercial MBD tool.
An MBD engineer can regenerate handoff artifacts for external MBD tool review from the same textual source.
A software engineer can inspect product-like ECU control logic that uses HAL-style boundaries and is not production-derived.
A test engineer can run preview scenarios and see inputs, scenario steps, observed behavior, expected behavior, and pass/fail results separated in the report.
A process reviewer can trace requirements to markup sections, generated artifacts, preview scenarios, and tests.
An AI workflow reviewer can see how MBD and harness artifacts reduce manual synchronization work across requirements, model changes, preview code, and reports.
A toolchain reviewer can distinguish the external MBD handoff path from the repo-local preview loop.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall read a fictional temperature value from `ToyTempSensorIC`.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall command a fictional fan duty output through `ToyFanDriverIC`.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall increase cooling command when temperature exceeds a fictional high threshold.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall reduce cooling command only after temperature falls below a fictional low threshold, preserving hysteresis.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall command fictional derating when temperature enters a high-but-valid protection range.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall enter a safe fictional command when the temperature input is marked invalid.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall latch a diagnostic fault when invalid sensor input persists beyond a fictional debounce window.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall recover from a latched fault only after explicit recovery conditions are met.

requirements.planned_evidence: Markup components, control rules, scenarios, reports
requirements.statement: The system shall expose normal, threshold-boundary, derating, sensor-fault, fault-latch, and recovery scenario behavior through generated review reports.

requirements.planned_evidence: Parser tests, IR snapshot tests, preview C export tests
requirements.statement: Each sample controller shall be described in `samples/<sample-id>/model.mbd.md` using Mermaid-like MBD markup as the public source.

requirements.planned_evidence: Parser tests, IR snapshot tests, preview C export tests
requirements.statement: The parser shall convert the markup into an internal IR snapshot without requiring YAML as an input.

requirements.planned_evidence: Parser tests, IR snapshot tests, preview C export tests
requirements.statement: The IR shall retain enough trace information to connect requirements, components, ports, states, flows, control rules, and tests.

requirements.planned_evidence: Parser tests, IR snapshot tests, preview C export tests
requirements.statement: Generated preview C shall use HAL-style headers for sensor and fan interactions rather than Python internals.

requirements.planned_evidence: Parser tests, IR snapshot tests, preview C export tests
requirements.statement: Generated preview C and Python preview behavior shall be labeled preview-only and non-certified.

requirements.planned_evidence: Mermaid-to-MBD parser tests and diagnostics tests
requirements.statement: Mermaid-like Markdown shall be the public authoring source.

requirements.planned_evidence: Mermaid-to-MBD parser tests and diagnostics tests
requirements.statement: The Mermaid-to-MBD engine shall parse authoring blocks into MBD IR.

requirements.planned_evidence: Mermaid-to-MBD parser tests and diagnostics tests
requirements.statement: The engine shall preserve requirement IDs, signal names, states, control rules, data flows, safety-class-like tags, and harness boundaries.

requirements.planned_evidence: Mermaid-to-MBD parser tests and diagnostics tests
requirements.statement: The engine shall reject ambiguous or malformed model semantics with actionable diagnostics.

requirements.planned_evidence: Mermaid-to-MBD parser tests and diagnostics tests
requirements.statement: Generated MBD IR shall be deterministic from unchanged Mermaid-like source.

requirements.planned_evidence: Mermaid-to-MBD parser tests and diagnostics tests
requirements.statement: Mermaid diagrams shall be review artifacts; they shall not replace semantic MBD IR.

requirements.planned_evidence: Requirements extraction tests and generated specification scaffold reviews
requirements.statement: The repository shall extract requirement IDs, safety-class-like tags, statements, source sections, and planned evidence from `Requirements.md`.

requirements.planned_evidence: Requirements extraction tests and generated specification scaffold reviews
requirements.statement: The repository shall generate or update a human-readable specification scaffold from extracted requirements.

requirements.planned_evidence: Requirements extraction tests and generated specification scaffold reviews
requirements.statement: Generated specification scaffolds shall preserve requirement IDs and expose assumptions, open questions, unresolved behavior, and expected review evidence.

requirements.planned_evidence: Requirements extraction tests and generated specification scaffold reviews
requirements.statement: The generated specification shall separate item behavior, software/control behavior, harness behavior, MBD handoff behavior, preview engine behavior, AI/RAG behavior, and process evidence.

requirements.planned_evidence: Requirements extraction tests and generated specification scaffold reviews
requirements.statement: The agent shall ask the user before inventing behavior not present in requirements or approved specification text.

requirements.planned_evidence: Requirements extraction tests and generated specification scaffold reviews
requirements.statement: Specification updates shall be deterministic from unchanged requirements and template rules.

requirements.planned_evidence: MBD scaffold generation tests and coverage validation reports
requirements.statement: The repository shall generate Mermaid-like MBD scaffold from approved requirements and human-readable specification content.

requirements.planned_evidence: MBD scaffold generation tests and coverage validation reports
requirements.statement: Generated MBD source shall include trace references from model elements to requirement IDs and specification anchors.

requirements.planned_evidence: MBD scaffold generation tests and coverage validation reports
requirements.statement: `DSC-B` and `DSC-C` requirements shall require explicit state, control, harness, scenario, and expected-behavior coverage before they can be marked covered.

requirements.planned_evidence: MBD scaffold generation tests and coverage validation reports
requirements.statement: The validator shall report requirements that lack specification coverage.

requirements.planned_evidence: MBD scaffold generation tests and coverage validation reports
requirements.statement: The validator shall report requirements that lack MBD coverage.

requirements.planned_evidence: MBD scaffold generation tests and coverage validation reports
requirements.statement: The validator shall report MBD behavior that lacks requirement or specification trace.

requirements.planned_evidence: MBD scaffold generation tests and coverage validation reports
requirements.statement: The scaffold generator shall emit open questions instead of silently inventing missing thresholds, timings, recovery rules, or fault semantics.

requirements.planned_evidence: IR snapshot tests and source-to-IR trace tests
requirements.statement: MBD IR shall represent ports, parameters, states, transitions, control rules, data flows, harness boundaries, and safety-class-like tags.

requirements.planned_evidence: IR snapshot tests and source-to-IR trace tests
requirements.statement: MBD IR shall retain traceability from requirement IDs to model elements.

requirements.planned_evidence: IR snapshot tests and source-to-IR trace tests
requirements.statement: MBD IR shall be tool-facing intermediate data, not the public authoring format.

requirements.planned_evidence: IR snapshot tests and source-to-IR trace tests
requirements.statement: MBD IR shall be exportable to existing MBD handoff artifacts.

requirements.planned_evidence: IR snapshot tests and source-to-IR trace tests
requirements.statement: MBD IR shall be executable by the repo preview engine for supported subset semantics.

requirements.planned_evidence: Exporter tests and deterministic regeneration tests
requirements.statement: The tool shall generate a Markdown review document from the markup.

requirements.planned_evidence: Exporter tests and deterministic regeneration tests
requirements.statement: The tool shall generate Mermaid and PlantUML preview diagrams from the markup.

requirements.planned_evidence: Exporter tests and deterministic regeneration tests
requirements.statement: The tool shall generate a Simulink model-generation `.m` script from the markup.

requirements.planned_evidence: Exporter tests and deterministic regeneration tests
requirements.statement: The tool shall generate a Modelica `.mo` text artifact from the markup.

requirements.planned_evidence: Exporter tests and deterministic regeneration tests
requirements.statement: The tool shall generate SCXML or Stateflow-oriented handoff content when state behavior is present.

requirements.planned_evidence: Exporter tests and deterministic regeneration tests
requirements.statement: The tool shall generate FMI-oriented metadata while clearly stating that no FMU is produced by this repository.

requirements.planned_evidence: Exporter tests and deterministic regeneration tests
requirements.statement: Generated artifacts shall be deterministic for unchanged markup.

requirements.planned_evidence: Exporter tests and deterministic regeneration tests
requirements.statement: Existing MBD tools shall remain the intended backend for production-grade verification and production MBD code generation.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview engine semantic subset tests and execution traces
requirements.statement: The repository shall provide a simplified Simulink-compatible preview engine.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview engine semantic subset tests and execution traces
requirements.statement: The engine shall execute only an explicitly declared subset of MBD semantics.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview engine semantic subset tests and execution traces
requirements.statement: The supported subset shall include at minimum inports, outports, parameters, compare, switch, logical operators, state transitions, and simple memory or hysteresis behavior.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview engine semantic subset tests and execution traces
requirements.statement: The engine shall produce deterministic step-by-step execution traces.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview engine semantic subset tests and execution traces
requirements.statement: The engine shall link each executed step to source model elements and requirement IDs when available.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview engine semantic subset tests and execution traces
requirements.statement: The engine shall not claim full Simulink compatibility.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview engine semantic subset tests and execution traces
requirements.statement: Unsupported behavior shall be reported as requiring external MBD tool verification.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview C generation tests and C syntax checks
requirements.statement: The repository shall provide a preview-only MBD-to-C scaffold path.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview C generation tests and C syntax checks
requirements.statement: Preview C shall be generated from MBD IR, not manually synchronized.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview C generation tests and C syntax checks
requirements.statement: Preview C shall use HAL-style boundaries.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview C generation tests and C syntax checks
requirements.statement: Preview C shall not call Python internals.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview C generation tests and C syntax checks
requirements.statement: Preview C shall be suitable for early AI/CI review, not production deployment.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview C generation tests and C syntax checks
requirements.statement: Production C generation is assumed to be handled by existing MBD/code-generation infrastructure.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview runtime tests and scenario report checks
requirements.statement: The preview harness shall simulate only fictional virtual IC boundaries needed by the scenario.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview runtime tests and scenario report checks
requirements.statement: The harness shall not modify ECU controller logic for simulation convenience.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview runtime tests and scenario report checks
requirements.statement: Preview scenarios shall be discrete steps, not a full plant or physics model.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview runtime tests and scenario report checks
requirements.statement: Reports shall separate model inputs, scenario steps, observed behavior, expected behavior, and pass/fail result.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview runtime tests and scenario report checks
requirements.statement: Scenario YAML, if used, shall be test input only and shall not be treated as the MBD source of truth.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview runtime tests and scenario report checks
requirements.statement: Harness shall support normal, threshold-boundary, derating, sensor fault, fault latch, and recovery scenarios.

requirements.planned_evidence: Preview runtime tests and scenario report checks
requirements.statement: Harness reports shall state which behavior was checked locally and which behavior requires external MBD/product-test infrastructure.

requirements.planned_evidence: Impact analysis reports and regenerated artifact diffs
requirements.statement: AI shall be able to propose MBD updates from changed requirements.

requirements.planned_evidence: Impact analysis reports and regenerated artifact diffs
requirements.statement: AI shall be able to regenerate artifacts deterministically from Mermaid-like source.

requirements.planned_evidence: Impact analysis reports and regenerated artifact diffs
requirements.statement: AI shall be able to identify impacted requirements, model elements, preview engine behavior, generated C scaffold, and scenarios.

requirements.planned_evidence: Impact analysis reports and regenerated artifact diffs
requirements.statement: Reports shall show enough traceability for a human reviewer to judge whether AI-generated changes are plausible.

requirements.planned_evidence: Impact analysis reports and regenerated artifact diffs
requirements.statement: The workflow shall reduce manual synchronization between requirements, MBD diagrams, harness scenarios, generated preview code, and reports.

requirements.planned_evidence: Retrieved-context citations, trace links, and ask-back records
requirements.statement: The workflow shall support retrieval over repository-local requirements, specifications, MBD source, generated artifacts, tests, reports, and design principles.

requirements.planned_evidence: Retrieved-context citations, trace links, and ask-back records
requirements.statement: Retrieved context shall be cited or trace-linked in AI-generated changes when it affects requirements, MBD, harness behavior, or code scaffolds.

requirements.planned_evidence: Retrieved-context citations, trace links, and ask-back records
requirements.statement: RAG shall be used to reduce missed synchronization across requirements, MBD IR, preview engine semantics, harness scenarios, generated C, and reports.

requirements.planned_evidence: Retrieved-context citations, trace links, and ask-back records
requirements.statement: RAG shall not ingest real hardware datasheets, confidential product documentation, production ECU code, or vendor-specific register maps for this fictional MVP.

requirements.planned_evidence: Retrieved-context citations, trace links, and ask-back records
requirements.statement: If required context is missing or contradictory, the agent shall ask the user instead of inventing product behavior.

requirements.planned_evidence: `Tasks.md`, docs updates, quality gates, project philosophy tests
requirements.statement: `Requirements.md` shall be updated before substantial changes to the validation example.

requirements.planned_evidence: `Tasks.md`, docs updates, quality gates, project philosophy tests
requirements.statement: `Tasks.md` shall break requirements into checked task-list items with explicit verification steps.

requirements.planned_evidence: `Tasks.md`, docs updates, quality gates, project philosophy tests
requirements.statement: Tests shall prove deterministic regeneration of generated artifacts.

requirements.planned_evidence: `Tasks.md`, docs updates, quality gates, project philosophy tests
requirements.statement: Documentation shall keep the commercial-tool-free MVP boundary clear while preserving the future path to Simulink, Modelica, and FMI export.

requirements.planned_evidence: `Tasks.md`, docs updates, quality gates, project philosophy tests
requirements.statement: Harness and preview engine implementation shall grow by TDD: add or update scenario/tests before adding supported semantics.

requirements.planned_evidence: `Tasks.md`, docs updates, quality gates, project philosophy tests
requirements.statement: New preview engine semantics shall not be considered supported until they are declared, tested, reported, and linked to requirements.
